_meta.instruction: 각 회사의 'hardcode_needed' 두 필드(annual_revenue_rank + factory) 와 notes 만 채워서 buyer_discovery/seeds/au_buyers_hardcode.json 으로 저장하세요. 다른 필드는 건드리지 마세요. Gemini 딥리서치 권장.

sandoz.address: Suite 1501, 100 Pacific Highway, North Sydney, NSW 2060

astellas.description: Astellas is a global pharmaceutical company, working at the forefront of healthcare change to turn innovative science into value for patients. Making a positive impact on patients’ lives is the purpose behind everything we do. We are relentless in our pursuit of scientific progress and in tackling unmet medical needs. We work every day to leverage what sets us apart - our focus on patients, our pioneering spirit, our culture of innovation, and the passion of our talented people to pursue the best solutions for patient.

chiesi_australia.description:
Chiesi Australia is an affiliate of Chiesi Farmaceutici, a family-owned Italian Pharmaceutical company with over 40 years’ experience manufacturing respiratory products. Chiesi is committed to providing novel asthma and COPD treatments for Australian patients.
As a certified B Corp, we’re part of a global community of businesses that meet high standards of social and environmental impact. The company aims at becoming net-zero by 2035. 

Visit us at /www.chiesi.com.au/

lilly.description: Lilly is a medicine company making life better for people around the world. We've turned science into pioneering new discoveries for nearly 150 years, and today, our medicines support more than 51 million people across the globe.

novartis.description: Novartis is reimagining medicine to improve and extend people’s lives. As a leading global medicines company, we use innovative science and digital technologies to create transformative treatments in areas of great medical need. In our quest to find new medicines, we consistently rank among the world’s top companies investing in research and development. Novartis products reach nearly 800 million people globally and we are finding innovative ways to expand access to our latest treatments.

pfizer.description:
Breakthroughs that change patients’ lives™

Throughout Pfizer's 175 year history, and over 65 years in Australia, we have remained dedicated to discovering and developing new and better ways to prevent and treat disease, and improve the health and wellbeing of people around the world.
For more information visit www.pfizer.com.au

viatris.address: Level 1, 30 The Bond 30-34 Hickson Road, Millers Point NSW 2000
viatris.description:
VIATRIS™ is a global healthcare company with a strong local presence and proud history of making high-quality medicines available to patients in Australia since 1982.
Our diverse portfolio of more than 1,000 medicine products ranges from complex generics to some of the world’s best-known brands, and new innovative medicines to meet the healthcare needs of the future. Our manufacturing facility in Queensland is an important part of our global network of 37 manufacturing, R&D and packaging sites, and produces more than 3.5 billion doses of tablets and capsules each year.

fresenius_kabi_australia.address: Level 2, 2 Woodland Way Mount Kuring-gai NSW 2080

aspen.description: Aspen Australia, an affiliate of the International Aspen Group, commenced operations in Australia and New Zealand in May 2001. Aspen manages pharmaceutical products in most therapeutic categories including Prescription Pharmaceutical brands, Speciality pharmaceutical products, and OTC healthcare products. For more details on specific Aspen products or the extensive range of clinical resources to assist your practice, please visit the Aspen Australia website www.aspenpharma.com.au/products or the Aspen Xpress app (download from the App store or Google play).

inmunotek_australia.description: Inmunotek is a Spanish biopharmaceutical company founded in 1992, dedicated to the research, development, manufacturing, and commercialisation of medicines and medical devices for allergy and immunology. Our commitment to research and innovation is driven by our mission to improve patients’ quality of life and deliver meaningful value to healthcare professionals. In Australia, our dedicated expert support team is leading the way, meeting the needs of Australian healthcare professionals to help deliver effective, personalised patient care.

inova_pharmaceuticals.description:
iNova Pharmaceuticals is leading the way to better health by constantly searching for new, practical solutions that improve the everyday health and wellbeing of people around the world.
Our portfolio of market-leading consumer health brands and prescription medicines are backed by science and span across the key therapeutic areas of throat, cough, cold & flu, skin care, sun care, pain management, wound care, weight management, natural health supplements among many others.

msd_australia.description: At MSD, known as Merck & Co., Inc., Rahway, NJ, USA in the United States and Canada, we are unified around our purpose: We use the power of leading-edge science to save and improve lives around the world. For more than a century, we’ve been at the forefront of research, bringing forward medicines, vaccines and innovative health solutions for the world’s most challenging diseases.

novo_nordisk.description:
We are a global healthcare company, founded in 1923 and headquartered just outside Copenhagen, Denmark.

Our purpose is to drive change to defeat diabetes and other serious chronic diseases such as obesity, and rare blood and rare endocrine diseases.

We do so by pioneering scientific breakthroughs, expanding access to our medicines and working to prevent and ultimately cure the diseases we treat.

We employ more than 45,000 people in 80 offices around the world, and market our products in 169 countries.

actor_pharmaceuticals.description: At Actor Pharmaceuticals we are passionate about providing new and alternative best-in-class pharmaceuticals and biosimilar medicines to healthcare professionals and patients. This year we are launching our Dermatology division with a suite of 4 new products for the treatment of Psoriasis, Hyperhidrosis and Actinic Keratosis.

aft_pharmaceuticals.description: AFT Pharmaceuticals is an innovator in the Australasian pharmaceutical industry - a thriving ASX listed healthcare organisation constantly seeking to improve upon the status quo through world class R&D that delivers innovative patient solutions. We’re focused on improving the health of Australians through innovation in pain relief, eye care, digestive health, natural health and dermatology, and we’re working harder than ever to provide you with effective options to meet patient needs in these challenging times. Let’s help you turn this innovative thinking into meaningful actions at GPCE.

ego_pharmaceuticals.description:
Proudly Australian-owned, Ego Pharmaceuticals has led the way in the development, manufacture and marketing of innovative skincare products for over 65 years. Ego’s mission is to exist for people who want healthy skin.
Ego is the specialist in skincare, backed by science. Products are made in Australia for the people of the world and fulfill the business’s commitment to providing consistently high quality products, underpinned by heritage and integrity.
From its inception as a family business in 1953, Ego has grown to become a world leader, producing a comprehensive dermatological skincare ran

gsk.description: GSK is a global biopharma company with the ambition and purpose to unite science, technology and talent to get ahead of disease together. Our global portfolio spans vaccines, specialty and general medicines. For more information on our purpose, strategy and culture, please visit https://au.gsk.com/en-au/company/purpose-strategy-and-culture/

lundbeck_australia.description:
Lundbeck is a biopharmaceutical company focusing exclusively on brain health. With more than 70 years of experience in neuroscience, we are committed to improving the lives of people with neurological and psychiatric diseases. 
As a focused innovator, we strive for our research and development programs to tackle some of the most complex neurological challenges. We develop transformative medicines targeting people for whom there are few or no treatments available, expanding into neuro-specialty and neuro-rare from our strong legacy within psychiatry and neurology.

mayne_pharma.description:
At Mayne Pharma, we are committed to deliver better health outcomes for Australian patients. We use our unique oral drug delivery systems to improve formulations and in-license novel medicines from around the world. Through innovation and collaborative partnerships, our products address unmet clinical needs for Australians. 
We are proud to support the areas of women’s and men’s health, dermatology and infectious disease.

stallergenes_australia.description:
Stallergenes Greer is a global biopharmaceutical company specialising in the diagnosis and treatment of allergies through the development and commercialisation of allergen immunotherapy (AIT) products and services.
Stallergenes Greer has over a century of allergen immunotherapy (AIT) experience and expertise. AIT, also known as desensitisation, uniquely alters the natural course of the respiratory allergies. AIT is the only therapeutic class capable of modifying the disease progression and potentially preventing the onset of the disease by inducing tolerance in the immune system.

theramex.description:
Theramex Australia is a specialty  pharmaceutical company solely committed to supporting the health needs of women.
By working closely with our partners and healthcare professionals, Theramex Australia provides a diverse portfolio of treatments that help women through life’s stages.
Our key therapy areas are; Contraception, Osteoporosis, Overactive Bladder, Fertility and Menopause.
